'''varusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:smalldom|smalldom]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-r-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:smalldom|smalldom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| varusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:værisith|værisith]] || [[word:værisij|værisij]] || [[word:værisish|værisish]] || [[word:værisi|værisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:varurusuth|varurusuth]] || [[word:varurusuj|varurusuj]] || [[word:varurusush|varurusush]] || [[word:varurusu|varurusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:varusuth|varusuth]] || [[word:varusuj|varusuj]] || [[word:varusush|varusush]] || [[word:varusu|varusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:varufsuth|varufsuth]] || [[word:varufsuj|varufsuj]] || [[word:varufsush|varufsush]] || [[word:varufsuf|varufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:varusuthu|varusuthu]] || [[word:varusuju|varusuju]] || [[word:varusushu|varusushu]] || [[word:varusuku|varusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:varusuth|varusuth]] || [[word:varusuj|varusuj]] || [[word:varusush|varusush]] || [[word:varusu|varusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:varusuthul|varusuthul]] || [[word:varusujul|varusujul]] || [[word:varusushul|varusushul]] || [[word:varusukul|varusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:varusuthuthu|varusuthuthu]] || [[word:varusujuju|varusujuju]] || [[word:varusushushu|varusushushu]] || [[word:varusuku|varusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:varusuthun|varusuthun]] || [[word:varusujun|varusujun]] || [[word:varusushun|varusushun]] || [[word:varusukun|varusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:varusuthuoro|varusuthuoro]] || [[word:varusujuoro|varusujuoro]] || [[word:varusushuoro|varusushuoro]] || [[word:varusukuoro|varusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
